concept: SL by CLICKTEAM LLC USA: Players assume the role of a late-night technician, surviving five nights in an underground facility by following AI instructions and reacting to hostile animatronics. Core gameplay involves managing power, interacting with control panels, lights, and doors via on-screen taps and swipes, and crawling through vents while listening for audio cues to avoid jumpscares.
name: Five Nights at Freddy's: SL
